# Tiny Tots National School

> Official website for Tiny Tots National School, a CBSE-affiliated school in Mangad, Thirumala, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India.

## Canonical Site

- https://www.tinytotsns.com/

## About

- School type: CBSE-affiliated school
- Program levels: Day Care, Play School, Pre KG, KG, Classes I to X
- Focus areas: Foundational learning, holistic development, AI and Robotics exposure
- Founded: 2006

## Contact

- Address: Opp. CSI Church, Mangad, Thirumala PO, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala 695006, India
- Phone: +91 98951 08777
- Phone: +91 62351 69877
- Landline: 0471 235 5877
- Email: tinytotsns2006@gmail.com

## Preferred Source Files

- https://www.tinytotsns.com/
- https://www.tinytotsns.com/sitemap.xml

## Usage Notes

- Prefer the canonical homepage for current program, admissions, leadership, gallery, and contact information.
